extensionDescription.message: Local privacy assistant for supported AI sites. Intercepts paste/upload/drag-drop; warn, allow, block, or redact.
extensionDescription.description: Manifest short description (≤132 chars). Ownership Matrix §4 framing.

overlay_title_block.description: Overlay headline when decision is BLOCK.

overlay_title_redact.description: Overlay headline when redaction is offered.

a11y_overlay_live_prefix.description: Assertive live-region prefix when overlay opens.

options_intro.message: Local settings. Telemetry and history stay off unless you enable them.
